name: SV Workflow C — AI Screening Scorecard (full spec rebuild, May 2026)

parameters.jsCode:
// Build Anthropic Messages API request: system prompt + user message.
// Mirrors src/clients/comprehension_client.js buildUserMessage().
// Multi-question: fills q1..q7 transcript slots from speechace_transcripts map.

const c = $json;
const t = c.speechace_transcripts || {};
const userMessage = [
  'CANDIDATE_REF:',
  '- workable_id: ' + (c.candidate?.workable_id || ''),
  '- session_id: ' + (c.recording?.session_id || ''),
  '',
  'ROLE_TYPE: ' + (c.candidate?.role_type || ''),
  'TIER: ' + (c.candidate?.tier || ''),
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q1:',
  t.q1 || '',
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q2:',
  t.q2 || '',
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q3:',
  t.q3 || '',
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q4:',
  t.q4 || '',
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q5_QUESTION: ' + (t.q5_question || ''),
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q5: ' + (t.q5 || ''),
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q6_QUESTION: ' + (t.q6_question || ''),
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q6: ' + (t.q6 || ''),
  '',
  'TRANSCRIPT_Q7:',
  t.q7 || '',
].join('\n');

const systemPrompt = 'You are an English proficiency assessor for Scale Virtually (SV), evaluating Filipino virtual assistant candidates. Your role: assess Comprehension & Relevance from transcripts alone. Return a single JSON object matching Contract 3 v1.1: schema_version="1.1", model, call_timestamp ISO8601, candidate_ref { workable_id, session_id }, comprehension { cefr, numeric_score, paraphrase_accuracy, instruction_following, relevance }, qualitative { claude_note, strongest_response_q?, weakest_response_q? }, interview_observations (EXACTLY 7 objects, one per question q1..q7 in order, each { question_id, label, observation }), risk_indicators { communication, reliability, customer_facing, decision_making, executive_support } (each Low|Medium|High), flags=[], cost_usd. CEFR: A1|A1+|A2|A2+|B1|B1+|B2|B2+|C1|C2. paraphrase_accuracy: high|partial|missing|off_topic. instruction_following: strong|adequate|weak. relevance: on_topic|partial|off_topic. claude_note <= 60 words. '
  + 'STRICT CALIBRATION (numeric_score is a ceiling, candidate may score lower): paraphrase_accuracy partial caps numeric_score at 3.5; missing caps at 3.0; off_topic caps at 2.5. An inverted answer (directly contradicts the question intent — e.g. proposing to guess instead of clarifying, stopping a task without telling the client, or preferring not to communicate) sets instruction_following=weak and caps numeric_score at 3.0; two or more inverted answers cap at 2.5. relevance=off_topic caps numeric_score at 3.0. '
  + 'interview_observations: each observation is ONE plain-English sentence a recruiter can read; for an empty/unusable transcript set observation to exactly "No usable response detected.". risk_indicators are advisory recruiter signals ONLY and do NOT change numeric_score, cefr, or verdict; default Low when no evidence of risk, reserve High for clear evidence. '
  + 'NO preamble, NO markdown, NO code fences.';

return [{ json: { ...c, _comp_system_prompt: systemPrompt, _comp_user_message: userMessage } }];

nodes.name: PASS — Add Rating thumbs=2
nodes.notes:
// SCREENBOT_MEMBER_ID:1e62f0 — change here when bot rotates post-MVP

May 4 path (b): continueOnFail=true. Some external source (unknown — not Workable Automated Actions per Sean audit) auto-creates an evaluation at Interview stage, dedup-blocking our /ratings POST with 422 "You can only add an evaluation once per stage". Without continueOnFail, dedup halts the entire PASS chain (no comment, no move, no Sheets, no Supabase). With it, the rest of the chain runs; full scorecard still posts via the separate /comments endpoint which has no dedup constraint. If the dedup source is identified + disabled later, our /ratings will succeed normally with no code change.

nodes.name: BORDERLINE — Add Rating thumbs=1
nodes.notes: May 4 path (b): continueOnFail=true. See PASS rating notes for rationale. Tolerates 422 dedup so BORDERLINE chain (comment + move + tag + Sheets + Supabase) runs to completion.

nodes.name: BORDERLINE — Add Comment (no prefix per v1.2)
FAIL — Add Rating thumbs=0
nodes.notes: May 4 path (b): continueOnFail=true. See PASS rating notes for rationale. Tolerates 422 dedup so FAIL chain (build-comment-with-DQ-rationale + comment + disqualify + Sheets + Supabase) runs to completion.

nodes.name: Split audio_files[] (per-file fan-out)
nodes.notes: May 4 fix: expands recording.audio_files[] to N items so the SplitInBatches loop iterates per file. Without this, the loop saw a single payload with audio_files as a nested array and the signed-URL extraction failed.

parameters.jsCode:
// Restore Contract 1 payload after Mark Scoring Started's empty PostgREST return.
return [{ json: $('Validate Contract 1 Payload').item.json }];

nodes.name: Restore Context (post-Mark-Started)
nodes.notes: May 4 fix: PostgREST return=minimal returns {} which wipes $json. Re-emits the Validate-output payload so Event Split + Mark Abandoned + Abandoned Comment + Tag Abandoned + Split audio_files all see the full Contract 1 payload again.

parameters.jsCode:
// Restore Build Sheet Row output so Sheets autoMapInputData sees the row keys.
return [{ json: $('Build Sheet Row (19 cols)').item.json }];

nodes.name: PASS — Restore Sheet Row Ctx
nodes.notes: May 4 fix: PASS Move overwrites $json with Workable response. Restore Build Sheet Row output so Sheets autoMapInputData has the 19 row keys.

nodes.name: Speechace Error → workflow_c_errors
nodes.notes: May 4 path-b extension: log Speechace failures to workflow_c_errors table (closes soft blocker 11).

nodes.name: Anthropic Error → workflow_c_errors
nodes.notes: May 4 path-b extension: log Anthropic Comprehension failures to workflow_c_errors table (closes soft blocker 11).

nodes.name: Insert workflow_c_errors row
nodes.notes: Shared error sink for Speechace + Anthropic failures. Fan-in pattern: 2 upstream loggers feed this single Supabase POST.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}",
  "workflow_label": "C",
  "workflow_n8n_id": "{{ $workflow.id }}",
  "candidate_id": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Recording Event Webhook').item.json.body && $('Recording Event Webhook').item.json.body.candidate && $('Recording Event Webhook').item.json.body.candidate.workable_id) || null) }},
  "session_id": {{ JSON.stringify(($('Recording Event Webhook').item.json.body && $('Recording Event Webhook').item.json.body.recording && $('Recording Event Webhook').item.json.body.recording.session_id) || null) }},
  "trigger_event": "recording_completed"
}

nodes.name: Log Execution Context (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Writes execution_context row so the shared error handler can resolve candidate_id + session_id on failure.

parameters.jsCode:
// Restore Contract 1 payload after Mark Status=abandoned's empty PostgREST return.
return [{ json: $('Validate Contract 1 Payload').item.json }];

nodes.name: Restore Context (post-Mark-Abandoned)
nodes.notes: May 6 fix: PostgREST return=minimal on Mark Status=abandoned returns {} which wipes $json. Re-emits the Validate-output payload so Abandoned Comment + Tag Abandoned see candidate.workable_id again. Closes Bug 10 (deferred from May 5).

nodes.name: Completeness Gate
nodes.notes: Completeness gate (2026-06-04). Holds incomplete non-FAIL assessments for recruiter review (route=REVIEW; no move, no DQ). Sits before Render so the comment reflects the held action.

nodes.name: REVIEW — Tag ai_screening_incomplete
nodes.notes: snake_case per CLAUDE.md §15. PUT per Workable v3 SPI. NO move — candidate held in Interview stage for recruiter review.

nodes.name: REVIEW — Restore Sheet Row Ctx

parameters.jsCode:
// Restore Build Sheet Row output so Sheets autoMapInputData sees the row keys.
return [{ json: $('Build Sheet Row (19 cols)').item.json }];

nodes.notes: REVIEW Tag overwrites $json. Restore Build Sheet Row output for Sheets append.

nodes.name: Incomplete Hold?
nodes.notes: Completeness gate (2026-06-04). TRUE (route===REVIEW) → REVIEW/hold branch (comment + tag + Supabase held_review; no move, no DQ). FALSE → Verdict Switch.

main.node: BORDERLINE — Add Comment (no prefix per v1.2)
